title: puya coarctata
intro: Puya coarctata is a type of plant species, commonly known as the Puna or Chilean Puya, which belongs to the Bromeliad family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. The plant contains bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, including respiratory problems and skin irritations. Puya coarctata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote digestive health and soothe irritated tissues.
